context: Tests whether the agent preserves PaperKit/PencilKit boundaries instead of treating PaperKit as a complete replacement for low-level drawing workflows.

checklist.name: Structured markup
checklist.description: Recommends PaperKit for structured markup such as text boxes, shapes, images, arrows, callouts, and system-standard insertion UI.

checklist.name: PencilKit ownership
checklist.description: Keeps custom brush behavior, raw PKDrawing/PKStroke analytics, and low-level lasso workflows in PencilKit.

checklist.name: Drawing migration
checklist.description: Mentions coexistence or migration using PaperMarkup.append(contentsOf: PKDrawing) for existing PencilKit drawings.

checklist.name: Document background
checklist.description: Suggests using contentView or an equivalent background view for annotating PDF/document pages with PaperKit.

checklist.name: No entitlement
checklist.description: Does not claim PaperKit requires special entitlements or Info.plist keys.

checklist.name: No full replacement
checklist.description: Does not recommend replacing the entire PencilKit-heavy canvas with PaperKit when low-level stroke behavior remains central.
